description: Labeled (voice, candidate) pairs for the Voice Match Score eval. Each pair has a human-assigned voice-fidelity rating (0-100): how well the candidate text reads in the reference user's authentic voice. Embeddings are synthesized deterministically by evals/voice-match/synthetic-embedder.ts so the eval is reproducible offline (no Voyage/OpenAI API call) while still exercising the real cosine+feature blend. Spearman target: >= 0.7.

referenceTexts.directBuilder: I shipped systems. Built scrappy tools fast. Took ownership end to end. Measured everything. Kept the rigor high and the talk pragmatic.
referenceTexts.warmCollaborator: I love building with great people. We learned together and supported each other. I'm grateful for the team that mentored me and grew with me.

pairs.candidate: I shipped pragmatic systems with rigor and total ownership. Measured the results, kept it scrappy.
Built and shipped systems end to end. Took ownership. Measured outcomes with rigor.
I built pragmatic tools and shipped them. Owned the work. Stayed measured.
Delivered systems with a focus on ownership and measured, rigorous execution.
A results-driven engineer who delivers measured outcomes and owns the systems they build.
Experienced professional skilled in delivering high-quality technical outcomes for the business.
A passionate, collaborative leader who loves bringing teams together to grow.
I think we could maybe leverage synergy to move the needle. I'm a rockstar ninja thought leader.
I love building with great people. We learned and grew together, and I'm grateful for the team.
Together with a wonderful team, we supported each other and mentored our way to growth.
I'm grateful for the people I learned from. We grew together and supported the team.
A people-first collaborator who values team growth, mentorship, and learning together.
Supportive teammate focused on collaboration and helping people develop their skills.
Professional with a track record of delivering results across cross-functional initiatives.
I shipped scrappy systems with rigor. Pragmatic, measured, owned end to end.
A disruptive rockstar ninja who leverages synergy to be a game changer in any room.
